channel.title: Anti-VM on HalfTimeOfLife
channel.description: Recent content in Anti-VM on HalfTimeOfLife

item.title: Anti-Emulation Techniques on Windows
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: Article explaining the main emulation detection techniques used by Windows malware, along with bypass strategies.

item.title: Thesis – Detection of Anti-VM Protections Used by Malware
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: In-depth research on anti-emulation techniques and their bypass in the context of Time Travel Debugging (TTD) in full system emulation.

item.title: Panoptiv
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: DLL using hooking techniques to bypass anti-VM protections.

item.title: Introduction to Anti-VM Protections
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: Educational video series presenting virtualization detection mechanisms and their implications in malware analysis.
